name: Poha
reason: Light, low-calorie, and easy to digest — a classic Indian breakfast that won't weigh you down.

name: Idli (3 pieces)
reason: Steamed, fermented, and virtually fat-free — one of the healthiest breakfast options available.

name: Egg Omelette (2 eggs)
reason: High-quality protein with essential amino acids — ideal fuel for muscle growth and morning energy.

name: Upma
reason: Semolina-based with vegetables — filling, balanced, and a great source of B vitamins.

alternatives.name: Oats Upma
alternatives.improvement: Higher fiber, better for sustained energy

name: Aloo Paratha (with butter)
reason: Calorie-dense from butter and potato — great for bulking but not ideal for weight loss goals.

name: Banana
reason: Natural sugars provide quick energy with potassium for muscle function — a perfect on-the-go breakfast.

name: Dalia (Broken Wheat Porridge)
reason: High fiber whole grain that keeps you full for hours — excellent for weight management.

alternatives.name: Oatmeal
alternatives.improvement: Slightly lower calories, higher beta-glucan fiber

name: Bread Toast with Butter
reason: Quick and convenient but refined carbs offer limited nutrition — acceptable occasionally.

name: Moong Dal Chilla
reason: Protein-packed lentil crepes — one of the best high-protein breakfasts in Indian cuisine.

name: Dal Rice
reason: Dal + rice is a complete protein source — the amino acids in each complement the other perfectly.

name: Paneer Butter Masala with Naan
reason: High in protein but heavy on cream and butter — a calorie bomb that's better as an occasional treat.

alternatives.name: Paneer Bhurji with Roti
alternatives.improvement: Same protein, far less saturated fat

name: Grilled Chicken with Roti
reason: Lean protein powerhouse — 32g of protein in one meal makes this a muscle-building champion.

name: Rajma Chawal
reason: Kidney beans are rich in plant protein and fiber — one of the most satisfying vegetarian lunches.

alternatives.name: Chana Salad
alternatives.improvement: Fewer carbs, same protein and fiber

name: Biryani (Chicken)
reason: Fragrant and protein-rich but heavy on oil and refined carbs — save it for special occasions.

name: Chole Bhature
reason: Deep-fried bhature with heavy chole — a classic indulgence that's very hard on your calorie budget.

alternatives.name: Chole with Roti
alternatives.improvement: Same chickpea nutrition, skip the fried bread

name: Khichdi
reason: The ultimate comfort food — easy to digest, low in fat, and perfect for a light recovery meal.

name: Paneer Wrap
reason: High protein supports muscle growth and keeps you full through the afternoon.

name: Roti with Sabzi (2 rotis)
reason: A balanced wholesome meal — whole wheat rotis with seasonal vegetables is hard to beat for everyday nutrition.

name: Pav Bhaji
reason: The vegetable bhaji is nutritious but excess butter and refined pav push the calories up significantly.

alternatives.name: Vegetable Khichdi
alternatives.improvement: More protein from lentils, no refined bread

name: Veg Burger
reason: Convenient but processed — the bun is refined carbs and most patties are fried. Eat mindfully.

name: Grilled Fish with Sabzi
reason: Omega-3 rich and lean — grilled fish is one of the best dinner choices for fat loss and muscle preservation.

name: Dal Tadka with Roti
reason: A light yet protein-rich dinner — lentils provide sustainable energy without spiking blood sugar at night.

alternatives.name: Soup + Salad
alternatives.improvement: Much lighter, great for weight loss

name: Palak Paneer with Roti
reason: Spinach + paneer = iron, calcium, and protein in one dish — a nutritional powerhouse dinner.

name: Chicken Curry with Rice
reason: Protein-dense dinner but the curry and rice combo can push calories high — portion control matters.

alternatives.name: Grilled Chicken with Dal
alternatives.improvement: Same protein, much cleaner for weight goals

name: Aloo Paratha (Dinner)
reason: Butter-heavy, high-carb dinner — eating this at night stores calories as fat since activity is low.

alternatives.name: Dal Tadka with Roti
alternatives.improvement: Better protein ratio, lighter on stomach

name: Dahi Rice
reason: Probiotic-rich yoghurt aids digestion — a light, soothing dinner perfect for gut health.

alternatives.name: Raita with Multigrain Roti
alternatives.improvement: More fiber from roti, same probiotic benefit

name: Tomato Soup
reason: Low calorie, antioxidant-rich, and deeply satisfying — ideal as a standalone light dinner.

name: Mutton Biryani
reason: Very high calorie with lots of oil — a special occasion meal, not a regular dinner choice.

name: Egg Bhurji with Roti
reason: Quick, affordable, and protein-rich — scrambled eggs with roti is a perfect all-rounder dinner.

name: Samosa (2 pieces)
reason: Deep-fried and heavy — the classic Indian snack is a calorie trap that offers almost no nutrition.

alternatives.name: Roasted Chana
alternatives.improvement: High protein, zero frying, much more filling

name: Chips (packet)
reason: Ultra-processed, high sodium, zero protein — satisfies cravings but adds nothing to your nutrition.

alternatives.name: Makhana (Fox Nuts)
alternatives.improvement: Crunchy snack with protein and minerals

name: Fruit Bowl
reason: Vitamins, antioxidants, and natural sugars — the cleanest snack option for health-conscious choices.

alternatives.name: Fruit Bowl with Yoghurt
alternatives.improvement: Added protein makes it more filling

name: Roasted Chana
reason: Crunchy, high-protein, low-calorie — the perfect anytime snack for any fitness goal.

alternatives.name: Edamame
alternatives.improvement: Complete plant protein with all amino acids

name: Biscuits (4 pieces)
reason: Refined sugar and flour with minimal nutrition — fine occasionally but not a smart snack habit.

name: Sprouts Chaat
reason: Sprouted legumes are nutrient-dense superfoods — protein, fiber, and enzymes in one tasty bowl.

name: Mixed Dry Fruits
reason: Healthy fats, micronutrients, and sustained energy — a premium snack for active individuals.

name: Buttermilk (Chaas)
reason: Probiotic-rich, hydrating, and almost zero fat — the most underrated healthy snack in Indian cuisine.

name: Makhana (Fox Nuts)
reason: Low calorie, low fat, high in magnesium — guilt-free crunchy snacking at its best.

alternatives.name: Roasted Chana
alternatives.improvement: Double the protein for better satiety

name: Vada Pav
reason: Deep-fried potato in a refined bun — high calorie, high sodium, and nutritionally poor.

name: Protein Shake (Whey)
reason: Fast-absorbing protein — optimal for post-workout muscle repair and growth.

alternatives.name: Moong Dal Chilla
alternatives.improvement: Whole food protein with more micronutrients
